description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided toolbox with a dark, marbled exterior finish, likely made of metal. The top features a prominent, arched handle with a textured, brown grip, suggesting comfort for carrying. A single, central latch is visible on the front, securing the lid to the base. The surface shows some wear, faint markings, and possible graffiti, giving it a rugged, urban appearance. There are no visible external trays or drawers, and the box appears to be a single-compartment design. Subtle white text and circular symbols are present on the lid, adding to its utilitarian look.
description: A rugged, rectangular metal toolbox with a brown arched handle, central latch, and worn, marbled dark finish. Subtle markings and symbols are visible on the lid.
description_view_0: End view showing the box's rectangular profile and the side of the handle, with faint surface markings visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the central latch, the full handle, and visible white markings and symbols on the lid.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, similar to view 0, showing the handle from the other side and more surface wear.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handle visible but no latch or markings, showing a plain marbled surface.
attribute_handle_type: Single arched handle, likely steel core with brown textured leather or plastic grip, fixed and ergonomic for carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single central clasp latch, made of metal, no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single main compartment implied, no visible trays, drawers, or dividers on the exterior.
attribute_external_labeling: 'Pd-1' text on lid, white circular symbol on lid, faint graffiti-like markings on lid and side
